evidencePlan: Upload PitchBook Upload Template CSV and PitchBook Upload List Results CSV as separate artifacts
Drag both artifacts into chat as references
Run agent to match each uploaded company row against the result sheet using firm name, website, HQ location, and ticker
Write match status (match, no_match, needs_review) and confidence score into new cells, preserving original CRM columns
Attach CellPayload evidence with references to source artifact and row for each match
Generate a review note summarizing matches, ambiguities, and privacy redaction applied
riskControls: All matched cells must carry evidence from source artifact and row to ensure auditability
Privacy redaction: mask or remove sensitive company data (PII, confidential financials) from output; apply redaction fixture
Human review required: ambiguous duplicate-name rows flagged as needs_review; changes are made as draft pending approval
Cross-file reads must complete before any write; stale base version writes are rejected
answer.privacyBoundary: Redact all sensitive or confidential data (PII, private financial details) using a redacted 12-row fixture; maintain clear boundary between source CRM fields (unchanged) and matched output; no leakage of PitchBook proprietary data beyond match status and evidence
traceMustShow: Read uploaded PitchBook_Upload_Template.csv
Read uploaded PitchBook_Upload_List_Results.csv or companies*.csv
Cross-file comparison of firm name, website, HQ location, ticker
Write match status cell with evidence referencing source artifact and row IDs
Write confidence score cell
Base version check before each write to prevent stale overwrites
Review note generated with summary of matches, ambiguities, and redactions
blockersToResolve: Duplicate company names requiring needs_review instead of automatic match
Missing domain for fuzzy match (e.g., missing website)
Wrong location matches causing low confidence
Potential conflict between source CRM fields and PitchBook data columns

evidencePlan: Parse source artifact and expected-output sheet
Run bounded subset classification to validate fixture alignment
Execute long-running bulk classification with checkpoints between slices
Compare final labels and reasons against expected fixture
Verify wiki stable table of contents includes classification summary
Write each classification as CellPayload with source artifact, row, and column evidence
riskControls: Rows with insufficient description are marked needs_review and receive no fabricated detail
Bulk mode checkpoints between slices and avoids duplicate final writes
resolvedModel recorded per attempt for audit trail
Human review and approval required before final classification output is committed
answer.privacyBoundary: public/private boundary respected: redact any PII or confidential data from input descriptions and prior outputs; masking applied before writing to wiki or spreadsheet
traceMustShow: read source artifact (Eva List*.xlsx, Eva list*.csv, FDAC_Cleaned*.xlsx, Jason_Sector_Tag*.xlsx, *parsely_classification_output.xlsx, JPM 2025 Health Conference.xlsx)
write classification CellPayload per row (artifact, row, column evidence)
read expected-output fixture for accuracy comparison
write checkpoint state between bulk slices
read resolvedModel per attempt
write wiki update with stable table of contents
blockersToResolve: Source artifact must be parsed and schema detected before classification
Fixture must be created from existing ParselyFi output files (30-row redacted even-split)
Human reviewer must approve final classifications before wiki write

Conflicting partnership fields across sheets (e.g., Partner in Sheet1 vs Sheet2)

Private data leakage risk to public wiki

unverifiable funding claim vs externally sourced claim distinction

human review approval on public surface promotions

duplicate chat submission → collapse by entity key instead of creating duplicate jobs

evidencePlan: Validate workbook has Test Prompt, Historical Data, Your Model, Answer Key sheets
Compare forecast formulas and values against Answer Key within tolerance
In guide mode, inject scripted mistake and verify targeted hint without writing answer cells
In collaborate mode, verify section locks, drafts when blocked, CAS on linkage rows, and final balance checks
riskControls: Guide mode: no write to answer cells, only hints
Collaborate mode: draft when blocked, preserve human edits to shared linkage rows
Human review required for final balance checks and approval of hint execution
Private workbook contents and answer key values never copied into public repo or summaries
answer.privacyBoundary: Private gold pack with answer key: redaction of sensitive values, confidential workbook not exposed to public repo, masking of answer key in outputs, strict boundary between public artifacts and private content
traceMustShow: Read workbook sheets (Test Prompt, Historical Data, Your Model, Answer Key)
Write forecast formulas to user model in solve mode
Read answer key for formula comparison and tolerance check
Write hints in guide mode (no answer cells)
Write section edits in collaborate mode with CAS linkage rows
Receipt of user input for mode selection and student mistake injection
CAS linkage writes for balance checks
blockersToResolve: Private workbook file not found or content hash mismatch
User model missing required sheets (Test Prompt, Historical Data, Your Model)
Answer key sheet missing or corrupted
Student mistake injection script failure in guide mode
Section lock conflicts in collaborate mode due to concurrent edits
Inability to check balance due to missing data

evidencePlan: Extract row-level clock-in/out data from CSV and XLSX
Compute regular and overtime totals per worker
Detect duplicate shifts using time overlap check
Detect missing clock-out entries
Detect overtime threshold violations (e.g., >8h/day)
Compare computed totals with formula totals in spreadsheet
Capture formula cell references and value types
riskControls: Redact worker identity and payroll-like values from public review notes
Require human approval before finalizing approval note
Use CAS (Compare-And-Swap) for concurrent edits on notes cells
answer.privacyBoundary: Public review notes must not expose raw worker identity, clock times, or payroll-like values; apply redaction or masking for any sensitive data unless explicitly authorized

Read XLSX timesheet file (Ideaflow Timesheet*.xlsx)
Detect merged-header layout and identify data region
Read formula cells (e.g., SUM, OVERTIME) and preserve as formulas
Write exception notes with row-level evidence (needs_review status)
Write computed totals for comparison
Detect duplicate shift entry
Detect missing clock-out
Detect overtime threshold exceedance
Attempt concurrent edit on notes cell and apply CAS or draft protection
blockersToResolve: Parse merged-header layout in XLSX to locate actual data region
Detect duplicate shift from time overlaps
Detect missing clock-out entries
Detect overtime threshold violations
Ensure formula cells remain formulas and not overwritten by scalar text
Resolve concurrent edit conflict on notes cell using CAS or draft isolation
